matchAny: SDK health check failed, falling back to ServerManager health probe
signatures.headline: Plugin queried the OpenCode runtime before the local server became reachable.
signatures.likelyCause: The UI or SDK health probe raced ahead of managed-server cold start.
nextActions: Compare plugin startup time with ServerManager ready time.
Move non-critical server snapshots to deferred/background refreshes.
Check whether a stale managed local server should be restarted instead of reused.

matchAny: Failed to sync conversation messages from server
signatures.headline: Conversation/session sync fell back because the server returned 404 for the active session.
signatures.likelyCause: The restored tab/session no longer exists on the local server, or hydration is reading stale session identifiers.
nextActions: Check conversation restore and hydration code paths for stale session IDs.
Compare persisted conversation/session metadata with the server's current session catalog.
Prefer graceful background fallback when missing sessions are expected during cold start.

matchAny: OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD is not set; server is unsecured.
signatures.headline: Managed local server started without a password.
signatures.likelyCause: Development environment is intentionally unsecured or missing server auth configuration.
nextActions: If the test environment is shared, set a password or isolate the network path.
Document whether this is expected for local-only test vaults.

signatures.headline: Local OpenCode server cold start dominates readiness.
signatures.likelyCause: Managed server startup, health probing, or project config resolution is slower than the plugin UI startup path.
nextActions: Measure spawn, health-check, and chat-ready milestones separately.
Delay server-dependent UI hydration until the server is healthy.
Cache or reuse safe warm state when the environment signature has not changed.

signatures.headline: The chat surface became interactive noticeably after reload completed.
signatures.likelyCause: Foreground availability waits on background server readiness or post-reload hydration.
nextActions: Keep the visible view-open path independent from background status refreshes.
Record server-ready and chat-ready milestones to separate UI cost from backend warmup.

signatures.headline: Plugin startup itself is slow before the view even renders.
signatures.likelyCause: Heavy synchronous work still runs in the plugin onload/startup path.
nextActions: Split startup into labeled substeps and move non-essential work behind the initial render.
Inspect settings load, storage init, and conversation metadata preload costs.

signatures.headline: View open/hydration is the visible bottleneck.
signatures.likelyCause: Tab restore, conversation hydration, or server-backed UI refresh is blocking visible render.
nextActions: Break the view-open path into restore, hydration-tail, and background refresh stages.
Make server-backed enrichments fire-and-forget when the visible shell can render first.
